title: Introduction to Commercial Real Estate
subtitle: Your on-ramp to the biggest asset class most investors never touch
description: The complete beginner's guide to commercial real estate. You'll learn what CRE actually is, the five major asset classes, who the players are, how CRE differs from residential, and why commercial properties build generational wealth faster than almost any other investment.
outcomes: Define commercial real estate and explain how it differs from residential
Identify the five major CRE asset classes and their key characteristics
Explain the roles of brokers, investors, developers, lenders, and tenants
Describe the primary ways investors make money in commercial real estate
Decide whether CRE investing is the right fit for your goals
